zh.lifeSummary: 當Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond於1245年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特迪 本 吉拉阿洛時，他的父親TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND31歲，母親Finola O'Brien29歲。他與Sadhbh Mac Carthy在密克羅尼西亞楚克莫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1306年在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年61歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond于1245年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特迪 本 吉拉阿洛时，他的父亲TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND31岁，母亲Finola O'Brien29岁。他与Sadhbh Mac Carthy在密克罗尼西亚楚克莫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1306年在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年61岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: Ó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Briain,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Toirdhealbhach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

variants.name: Tárlach
meanings: Modern reduced form of Toirdhealbhach , pronounced ‘tor-lakh’.

nameMeanings.name: Mór
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond was born in 1245, in Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Ireland, his father, TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND, was 31 and his mother, Finola O'Brien, was 29. He married Sadhbh Mac Carthy in Mor, Chuuk, Micronesia. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1306, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond est né en 1245, à Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlande, son père, TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Finola O'Brien, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Sadhbh Mac Carthy à Mor, Chuuk, Micronésie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1306, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond 1245 in Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND 31 und seine Mutter Finola O'Brien 29. Er hat in Mor, Chuuk, Mikronesien Sadhbh Mac Carthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1306 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ennis, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond è nato il nel 1245 nel Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Finola O'Brien, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Sadhbh Mac Carthy nel Mor, Chuuk, Micronesia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1306, nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomondが1245年にアイルランドムンスターディオセゼ オフ キラロで生まれた時，父TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMONDは31歳，母Finola O'Brienは29歳であった。ミクロネシアチウウクモーでSadhbh Mac Carthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1306年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで61歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond(이)가 1245년 아일랜드 먼스터 디오스스 프 킬라로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Finola O'Brien(은)는 29세였다. 그는 미크로네시아 c후크 모르에서 Sadhbh Mac Carthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1306년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond nasceu em 1245, em Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Finola O'Brien, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Sadhbh Mac Carthy em Mor, Chuuk, Micronésia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1306, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond родился в 1245 г. в местности диосес оф киллало, мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Finola O'Brien, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sadhbh Mac Carthy в местности мор, чуук, Микронезия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1306 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1276 to 1306: mai le 1276 e o'o I le 1306

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Toirdhealbhach Mór Ó Briain, King of Thomond nació en 1245, en Diocese of Killaloe, Munster, Irlanda, su papá, TEIGE CAEL UISCE THOMOND, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Finola O'Brien, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sadhbh Mac Carthy en Mor, Chuuk, Micronesia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1306, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
